name: GeoNames cities15000
note: zip of cities15000.txt — tab-separated GeoNames dump (col 1 = geonameid, col 2 = name, col 3 = asciiname, col 15 = population). Populated places > 15000 people (~34k rows). Pinned to a frozen snapshot. GeoNames regenerates the dump ~daily; on an upstream refresh strict verification fails until this sha256 is re-pinned (delete the cached zip, re-fetch, and paste the new hash).
